methods.name: odoo.addons.maintenance_equipment_sequence.models.maintenance.MaintenanceEquipmentCategory._compute_seq_number_next
documentation:
Compute 'sequence_number_next' according to the current sequence
in use, an ir.sequence or an ir.sequence.date_range.

methods.name: odoo.addons.maintenance_equipment_sequence.models.maintenance.MaintenanceEquipmentCategory._inverse_seq_number_next
documentation: Inverse 'sequence_number_next' to edit the current sequence next number
